testcase.name: test_feature_badge_offline_capable

failure.message:
AssertionError: The 'Offline Capable' feature badge is not rendering on the landing page. assert 'Offline Capable' in 'PancreaScan
AI-POWERED • FEDERATED LEARNING
AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' + where 'PancreaScan
AI-POWERED • FEDERATED LEARNING
AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' = <test_01_landing.TestLandingPage object at 0x0000027C7F0CA450>.body

testcase.failure:
tests\e2e	est_01_landing.py:70: in test_feature_badge_offline_capable assert "Offline Capable" in self.body, \ E AssertionError: The 'Offline Capable' feature badge is not rendering on the landing page. E assert 'Offline Capable' in 'PancreaScan
AI-POWERED • FEDERATED LEARNING
AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' E + where 'PancreaScan
AI-POWERED • FEDERATED LEARNING
AI-Powered Early Detection of Pancreatic Anomalies
Access PancreaScan
\U0001f535' = <test_01_landing.TestLandingPage object at 0x0000027C7F0CA450>.body

testcase.name: test_remember_me_checkbox_is_togglable

failure.message: selenium.common.exceptions.ElementNotInteractableException: Message: element not interactable (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.217); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementnotinteractableexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff76abb7de5+14895] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff76abb7e50+14900] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff76a91d396] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff76a978dc4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff76a96bce6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff76a9a005a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff76a96b566] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff76a9c486f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff76a969df8] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff76a96ace3] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff76aeccc49+3296f9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff76aec7375+323e25] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff76aeebc82+348732] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff76abd6045+32af5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff76abdecec+3b79c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff76abc1bc4+1e674] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff76abc1d54+1e804] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff76aba60e7+2b97] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffe13e0e957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffe14f07c1c+2c]

testcase.name: test_history_table_column_headers_visible

failure.message: AssertionError: The Patient History table is missing one or more column headers (Patient ID, Patient Name, Scan Result). The history table component may have a rendering error. assert False + where False = all(<generator object TestDashboardTabSwitching.test_history_table_column_headers_visible.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x0000027C7F233300>)

testcase.failure: tests\e2e\test_05_dashboard_nav.py:125: in test_history_table_column_headers_visible assert all(col in body for col in ["Patient ID", "Patient Name", "Scan Result"]), \ E AssertionError: The Patient History table is missing one or more column headers (Patient ID, Patient Name, Scan Result). The history table component may have a rendering error. E assert False E + where False = all(<generator object TestDashboardTabSwitching.test_history_table_column_headers_visible.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x0000027C7F233300>)

testcase.name: test_history_table_patient_id_column_present

failure.message:
AssertionError: The 'Patient ID' column header is missing from the Patient History table. assert 'Patient ID' in '✅ Welcome back, Dr. Test Doctor!
PancreaScan
\U0001f4ca
Dashboard
\U0001fa7b
Patient History
\U0001f4c8
Analytics
⚙️
Settings
\U0001f6aa Log Out
Hello, Dr. Test Doctor
Clinical Portal Diagnostics Suite
Online
Patient History Records
Secure clinical CT screening scan archives synced from MySQL
All Scans (0)
Normal (0)
Abnormal (0)
PATIENT ID PATIENT NAME SCAN RESULT AI CONFIDENCE SYNC TIMESTAMP ACTIONS
No medical CT scans match the selected category.' + where '✅ Welcome back, Dr. Test Doctor!
PancreaScan
\U0001f4ca
Dashboard
\U0001fa7b
Patient History
\U0001f4c8
Analytics
⚙️
Settings
\U0001f6aa Log Out
Hello, Dr. Test Doctor
Clinical Portal Diagnostics Suite
Online
Patient History Records
Secure clinical CT screening scan archives synced from MySQL
All Scans (0)
Normal (0)
Abnormal (0)
PATIENT ID PATIENT NAME SCAN RESULT AI CONFIDENCE SYNC TIMESTAMP ACTIONS
No medical CT scans match the selected category.' = <test_09_history.TestPatientHistory object at 0x0000027C7F1A96E0>.body
